content_body:
Bear Claw Vineyards is a family and dog-friendly winery located just 10 minutes from downtown Blue Ridge. Enjoy a relaxing day sampling their award-winning wines in the rustic elegance of their tasting room or on their scenic outdoor patio. Bear Claw Vineyards prides itself on sustainable farming practices and producing high-quality wines that capture the essence of the region. Visit them for wine tastings, tours, and special events, and create unforgettable memories in a truly enchanting setting.

Keep an eye on their schedule for live music!
title: Bear Claw Vineyards
